targets.label: Proficient Cut
targets.provenance: Summative proficient cut; derived from cutscores + the achievement_levels proficient mask (basis=proficiency_boundary -- the scale score entering the first proficient level). No new numbers: the target inherits the sidecar cutscores provenance (currently PLACEHOLDER -- replace with official IDOE ILEARN cuts before any client-facing run).

targets.label: ELP Exit Target
targets.provenance: IN ELP exit = Overall composite >= WIDA level 4.2 (OLD scale); per-grade scale-score thresholds resolved at build time from the vendored widaACCESS_ss_to_pl OLD lookup (build/wida_access_ss_to_pl_OLD.csv). PRELIMINARY: confirm Indiana's official exit level and the LONG CONTENT_AREA code for the Overall composite (default 'ELP_COMPOSITE') before activating; WIDA resets the scale July 2026 (new-scale exit = new sidecar).
